title: Genetic disruption of synthesis pathways of Arabidopsis secondary metabolites dramatically affects root-associated nematode populations directly and via modulation of microbial communities
author: Md Maniruzzaman Sikder
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Dataset of nematode, fungal and bacterial sequence reads of Arabidopsis roots. Dataset of fungal and bacterial sequence reads of Arabidopsis microbial suspension. DNA concentration of Arabidopsis root microbial suspension. Meloidogyne incognita J2 invasion into tomato roots. qPCR dataset of Meloidogyne hapla infection pressure into Arabidopsis roots.
steps_raw: Dataset of nematode, fungal and bacterial sequence reads of Arabidopsis roots. Dataset of fungal and bacterial sequence reads of Arabidopsis microbial suspension. DNA concentration of Arabidopsis root microbial suspension. Meloidogyne incognita J2 invasion into tomato roots. qPCR dataset of Meloidogyne hapla infection pressure into Arabidopsis roots.
keywords: root metabolites, soil nematodes, root microbiome, endoparasites, camalexin, glucosinolates, flavonoids.
